summary: Test suite covers core matrix generation scenarios (cartesian product, include/exclude rules, options, size limits) through act-based integration testing. Strengths: all main requirements exercised, fixtures provide realistic test cases, good workflow validation checks. Critical gaps: no validation error testing (missing matrix, empty dimensions, wrong types, invalid JSON, file errors); no edge cases (single-dimension matrices, all-combinations-excluded, no includes/excludes); only one error case (too-large) tested. All testing is integration-level via act with no unit tests of individual functions (validateConfig, matchesRule, applyIncludes); output parsing via stripActPrefix/extractJson is fragile and untested itself. Approach follows the requirement to test via act, but lack of comprehensive error/validation scenarios and edge cases limits confidence in catching subtle regressions. Would reliably catch happy-path breaking changes but likely miss bugs in error handling or validation logic.
